---
name: New Gate proposal
about: Propose a new Quality Gate for an existing or new agent
title: "gate: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Agent

Which agent should this gate belong to?

## Gate description

What should the gate verify?

## Justification

What real problem does this gate prevent? (Link to an issue, incident or pattern if possible.)

## Suggested check

How should the gate be verified? (e.g., file exists, command passes, pattern absent)
